texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Limited (hereinafter referred to as VRL), and
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Limited (hereinafter referred to as VRL), and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: On payment of 50,000 KHS as deposit to VRL, this contract will entitle the above Tour Operator or Hotel to the following green fee rates:
texts.text: On payment of 50,000 KHS as deposit to VRL, this contract will entitle the above Tour Operator or Hotel to the following green fee rates:

texts.text: CONFIDENTIAL TOUR OPERATOR /HOTEL GREENFEE KENYAN NATIONALS

texts.text: PUBLIC GREEN FEE RATES KENYAN NATIONALS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: offered in this agreement to the above company will be as follows:
texts.text: offered in this agreement to the above company will be as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: On signature of this contract, the above company will be permitted to reserve starting times from_____________to____________and from ___________to ____________ at the Confidential Tour Operator/Hotel rates shown in this contract. The starting times must always be requested by telephone and re-confirmed by e-mail or written correspondence to VRL.
texts.text: On signature of this contract, the above company will be permitted to reserve starting times from_____________to____________and from ___________to ____________ at the Confidential Tour Operator/Hotel rates shown in this contract. The starting times must always be requested by telephone and re-confirmed by e-mail or written correspondence to VRL.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: offered to the Tour Operator/Hotel are as follows:
texts.text: offered to the Tour Operator/Hotel are as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Green fees for 18 or 9 holes should be paid at the Golf Reception, by presenting the Tour Operator/Hotel greenfee voucher on the day of play. A sample of the Tour Operator/Hotel voucher must be provided to VRL.
texts.text: Green fees for 18 or 9 holes should be paid at the Golf Reception, by presenting the Tour Operator/Hotel greenfee voucher on the day of play. A sample of the Tour Operator/Hotel voucher must be provided to VRL.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If a valid greenfee voucher is not presented at the reception, VRL reserves the right to prevent the client from playing until the payment is received.
texts.text: If a valid greenfee voucher is not presented at the reception, VRL reserves the right to prevent the client from playing until the payment is received.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The invoices of the received vouchers will be sent to the Tour Operator/Hotel every 30 days and invoices must be paid within the following 15 days period.
texts.text: The invoices of the received vouchers will be sent to the Tour Operator/Hotel every 30 days and invoices must be paid within the following 15 days period.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If this period is exceeded. VRL reserves the right to cancel any further bookings until outstanding payments are settled.
texts.text: If this period is exceeded. VRL reserves the right to cancel any further bookings until outstanding payments are settled.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: procedure for all starting times booked in this category will be as follows:
texts.text: procedure for all starting times booked in this category will be as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For bookings made more than 14 days before the day of play, the cancellation is 7 days. If cancellation is made after this date is passed, a penalty of 30% of the Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged and the starting times will revert to VRL, if cancellation is not made two (2) days before the day of play, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings made more than 14 days before the day of play, the cancellation is 7 days. If cancellation is made after this date is passed, a penalty of 30% of the Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged and the starting times will revert to VRL, if cancellation is not made two (2) days before the day of play, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For bookings made less than 14 days before the day of play, the cancellation is 4 days. If cancellation is made after this date  is passed, a penalty of 50% of the Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged and the starting times will revert to VRL, if cancellation is not made two (2) days before the day of play, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel greenfee rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings made less than 14 days before the day of play, the cancellation is 4 days. If cancellation is made after this date  is passed, a penalty of 50% of the Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged and the starting times will revert to VRL, if cancellation is not made two (2) days before the day of play, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel greenfee rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For bookings made within 7 days of the day of play, the cancellation is 48 hours. If cancellation is made after this date is passed, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings made within 7 days of the day of play, the cancellation is 48 hours. If cancellation is made after this date is passed, a penalty of the full Tour Operator/Hotel green fee rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For bookings made within 48 hours, there will be no penalty for cancellation.
texts.text: For bookings made within 48 hours, there will be no penalty for cancellation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: We encourage guests to show a valid handicap certificate at the golf reception before playing.
texts.text: We encourage guests to show a valid handicap certificate at the golf reception before playing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: It is compulsory that all players are accompanied by a caddie on the golf course which will be charged at the rate of KES 1,000 for 18 holes.
texts.text: It is compulsory that all players are accompanied by a caddie on the golf course which will be charged at the rate of KES 1,000 for 18 holes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If a guest rents a golf cart, the compulsory caddie fee is not applicable. A guest may still pay for a caddie to accompany the players on the course at their own discretion.
texts.text: If a guest rents a golf cart, the compulsory caddie fee is not applicable. A guest may still pay for a caddie to accompany the players on the course at their own discretion.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Each Player must have his or her own golf bag with their own clubs.
texts.text: Each Player must have his or her own golf bag with their own clubs.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: No sharing of golf bags or clubs is permitted on the golf course at any time.
texts.text: No sharing of golf bags or clubs is permitted on the golf course at any time.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: All players must wear appropriate golf footwear on the golf course at all times.
texts.text: All players must wear appropriate golf footwear on the golf course at all times.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A buggy may carry a maximum of two (2) players and (2) golf bags and no person under the age of 17 may drive a buggy hired at Vipingo Ridge Golf Club.
texts.text: A buggy may carry a maximum of two (2) players and (2) golf bags and no person under the age of 17 may drive a buggy hired at Vipingo Ridge Golf Club.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: All players are responsible for any damage to buggies during their round and must full reimburse VRL all costs associated with the damages.
texts.text: All players are responsible for any damage to buggies during their round and must full reimburse VRL all costs associated with the damages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: All players must replace divots on the fairways, repair pitch marks on the greens and rake bunkers after play.
texts.text: All players must replace divots on the fairways, repair pitch marks on the greens and rake bunkers after play.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In order to maintain our high standards of dress, members & guests are expected to dress accordingly. No swimwear, gym wear, sportswear, denim jeans, T shirts without collars and training shoes will be allowed on the golf course at any time. Players are expected to wear socks with appropriate golf footwear on the golf course. Shirts must also be tucked in to the waist band of Bermuda length shorts and trousers at all times on the golf course.
texts.text: In order to maintain our high standards of dress, members & guests are expected to dress accordingly. No swimwear, gym wear, sportswear, denim jeans, T shirts without collars and training shoes will be allowed on the golf course at any time. Players are expected to wear socks with appropriate golf footwear on the golf course. Shirts must also be tucked in to the waist band of Bermuda length shorts and trousers at all times on the golf course.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Note: It is the responsibility of the Tour Operator/Hotel to inform their clients of the above requirements. If clients are refused permission to play because they do not conform with the above rules, the green fee will be charged.
texts.text: Note: It is the responsibility of the Tour Operator/Hotel to inform their clients of the above requirements. If clients are refused permission to play because they do not conform with the above rules, the green fee will be charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please help us to avoid difficult situations by informing your clients and staff clearly of our rules in advance
texts.text: Please help us to avoid difficult situations by informing your clients and staff clearly of our rules in advance

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The terms of this agreement must be adhered to and failure to do so, may result in the cancellation at any time.
texts.text: The terms of this agreement must be adhered to and failure to do so, may result in the cancellation at any time.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Signed on behalf of 						Signed on behalf of
texts.text: Signed on behalf of 						Signed on behalf of

texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd                					the above Tour Operator/ Hotel
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd                					the above Tour Operator/ Hotel

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These are conditions for the various situations that arise in due to bad weather:
texts.text: These are conditions for the various situations that arise in due to bad weather:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: THE COUSRSE WILL BE CLOSED FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS
texts.text: THE COUSRSE WILL BE CLOSED FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: if the conditions are bad enough in any way as to be considered dangerous to the players or damaging to the golf course. – i.e., fog or flooding.
texts.text: if the conditions are bad enough in any way as to be considered dangerous to the players or damaging to the golf course. – i.e., fog or flooding.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In bad weather, a final decision will be made at 07h00am each morning and hourly after this. The Tour Operator/Hotel should contact the reception of the Club to be informed of the condition of the course
texts.text: In bad weather, a final decision will be made at 07h00am each morning and hourly after this. The Tour Operator/Hotel should contact the reception of the Club to be informed of the condition of the course

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: No NO-SHOW green fee will be charged
texts.text: No NO-SHOW green fee will be charged

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: THE COURSE IS CLOSED AFTER THE CLIENT HAS STARTED HIS/HER ROUND
texts.text: THE COURSE IS CLOSED AFTER THE CLIENT HAS STARTED HIS/HER ROUND

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In the above situations the following conditions will apply:
texts.text: In the above situations the following conditions will apply:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the client has played no more than 5 holes/full cash or voucher refund will be given, depending on the method of green fee payment.
texts.text: If the client has played no more than 5 holes/full cash or voucher refund will be given, depending on the method of green fee payment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the client has played more than 5 holes and not more than 12 holes, a 9-hole cash or voucher refund will be given depending on the method of green fee payment.
texts.text: If the client has played more than 5 holes and not more than 12 holes, a 9-hole cash or voucher refund will be given depending on the method of green fee payment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NB: If either of the above procedures are used, the necessary adjustments to the client’s voucher must be made and the appropriate Tour Operator/Hotel will be notified. The adjusted voucher will be signed by a member of the Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort management  and the client.
texts.text: NB: If either of the above procedures are used, the necessary adjustments to the client’s voucher must be made and the appropriate Tour Operator/Hotel will be notified. The adjusted voucher will be signed by a member of the Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort management  and the client.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If clients request an alternative starting time, a credit 9/18hole voucher may be issued by the Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort Reception if there is a suitable starting time available within the next 48 hours.
texts.text: If clients request an alternative starting time, a credit 9/18hole voucher may be issued by the Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort Reception if there is a suitable starting time available within the next 48 hours.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: THE COURSE IS OPEN BUT THE USE OF BUGGIES IS NOT PERMITTED
texts.text: THE COURSE IS OPEN BUT THE USE OF BUGGIES IS NOT PERMITTED

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3.1 In this situation, the following conditions will apply:
texts.text: 3.1 In this situation, the following conditions will apply:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: a.) not being allowed to use a buggy is not considered a reason for a client to NO-SHOW and a relative NO-SHOW charge will be made. However, if a client can present a valid medical certificate to show that he/she requires a buggy to play the NO-SHOW charge will be waived.
texts.text: a.) not being allowed to use a buggy is not considered a reason for a client to NO-SHOW and a relative NO-SHOW charge will be made. However, if a client can present a valid medical certificate to show that he/she requires a buggy to play the NO-SHOW charge will be waived.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All decisions concerning the above conditions will be made by Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort and it is up to the Tour Operator/Hotel to inquire with the Golf Reception if they have any doubt as to the procedure on any particular day.
texts.text: All decisions concerning the above conditions will be made by Vipingo Ridge Golf Resort and it is up to the Tour Operator/Hotel to inquire with the Golf Reception if they have any doubt as to the procedure on any particular day.
